description_en: A fun story about dinosaurs hatching next door! When the eccentric Mr. Puff moves in with a basket of dinosaur eggs, Amy and Tom discover that growing dinosaurs can be a BIG problem — and a BIG adventure!
description_zh: 一个关于恐龙在隔壁孵出来的有趣故事！当古怪的帕夫先生带着一篮恐龙蛋搬来时，艾米和汤姆发现，长大的恐龙可能是个大麻烦——也是一场大冒险！

characters.personality_en: Warm, storytelling
Curious, brave
Timid but sweet
Eccentric, fun
Tough but gentle
Playful, loves flowers

lines.text_en: Hello, everyone! Welcome to our play — "The Dinosaurs Next Door"! This is a story about a girl named Amy, and her little brother Tom. They live in a nice little house on Maple Street. One day, a very strange man moves in next door. His name is Mr. Puff, and he has a very BIG secret... And now... let the story begin!
lines.text_zh: 大家好！欢迎来到我们的小剧场——《隔壁的恐龙》！这个故事讲的是一个叫艾米的女孩，还有她的弟弟汤姆。他们住在枫叶街上一栋漂亮的小房子里。有一天，一个非常奇怪的人搬到了隔壁。他叫帕夫先生，他有一个很大的秘密……好了，故事开始啦！

scenes.stage_direction_en: Amy and Tom are playing in their front yard. A moving truck pulls up next door.
scenes.stage_direction_zh: 艾米和汤姆在前院玩耍。隔壁开来了一辆搬家卡车。

lines.text_en: Look! Someone's moving in next door!
lines.text_zh: 你看！隔壁搬来了新邻居！

lines.text_en: Do you think they have kids?
lines.text_zh: 他们家有没有小朋友呀？

lines.text_en: Mr. Puff walks out carrying a big basket.
lines.text_zh: 帕夫先生提着一个大篮子走出来。

lines.text_en: Hello there! I'm Mr. Puff, your new neighbor. Come on in and take a look!
lines.text_zh: 你们好呀！我是帕夫先生，你们的新邻居。快进来看看吧！

lines.text_en: Whoa, so many cool things! What's in the basket?
lines.text_zh: 哇，好多好玩的东西！篮子里是什么？

lines.text_en: This? This is my most precious treasure — dinosaur eggs!
lines.text_zh: 这个？这是我最宝贝的东西——恐龙蛋！

lines.text_en: Dinosaur eggs?! Are you serious?!
lines.text_zh: 恐龙蛋？！真的假的？！

lines.text_en: Of course I'm serious! Shh... don't tell anyone, okay?
lines.text_zh: 当然是真的！嘘——别告诉别人哦，好不好？

lines.text_en: Amy and Tom couldn't believe it. Dinosaur eggs? In the house next door? They went home, but they couldn't stop thinking about those eggs...
lines.text_zh: 艾米和汤姆简直不敢相信。恐龙蛋？就在隔壁？他们回了家，但脑子里全是那些蛋……

scenes.stage_direction_en: Late that night, strange sounds come from next door...
scenes.stage_direction_zh: 深夜，隔壁传来奇怪的声音……

lines.text_en: Late that night, Amy and Tom heard strange noises coming from next door...
lines.text_zh: 那天深夜，艾米和汤姆听到隔壁传来奇怪的声音……

lines.text_en: Did you hear that? Something's cracking!
lines.text_zh: 你听到了吗？有东西在裂开！

lines.text_en: I'm scared! What if it's a monster?
lines.text_zh: 我好害怕！要是怪物怎么办？

lines.text_en: The eggs crack open. Rex and Daisy pop out.
lines.text_zh: 蛋壳裂开，雷克斯和黛西钻了出来。

lines.text_en: Whoa... how long was I asleep? Where am I?
lines.text_zh: 哇——我睡了多久啊？这是哪里？

lines.text_en: It's so bright! Everything is so big! Ooh, what's that?
lines.text_zh: 好亮！什么都好大！咦，那是什么？

lines.text_en: Oh my goodness! You actually hatched!
lines.text_zh: 天哪！你们真的孵出来了！

lines.text_en: Aww, they're adorable! But... wait, are they getting bigger?
lines.text_zh: 好可爱！但是……等等，它们是不是在变大？

lines.text_en: And Amy was right. The dinosaurs were growing — VERY fast!
lines.text_zh: 艾米说对了。恐龙们在长大——而且非常非常快！

scenes.stage_direction_en: A few days later, the dinosaurs are bigger than the house.
scenes.stage_direction_zh: 几天后，恐龙比房子还大了。

lines.text_en: A few days passed, and Rex and Daisy were HUGE. They couldn't even fit inside Mr. Puff's house anymore!
lines.text_zh: 几天过去了，雷克斯和黛西变得好大好大。它们已经塞不进帕夫先生的房子了！

lines.text_en: Mr. Puff, I can't fit through the door anymore!
lines.text_zh: 帕夫先生，我出不去了！门太小了！

lines.text_en: Oh dear, oh dear... dinosaurs grow SO fast! What are we going to do?
lines.text_zh: 哎呀呀……恐龙长得太快了！怎么办呢？

lines.text_en: Maybe they can live in the backyard?
lines.text_zh: 也许它们可以住在后院？

lines.text_en: Good idea! But the backyard's too small. What about the park by the pond?
lines.text_zh: 好主意！但是后院太小了。池塘旁边的空地怎么样？

lines.text_en: Can I have a garden? I love flowers!
lines.text_zh: 我可以有个花园吗？我最喜欢花！

lines.text_en: Can I have a swimming pool? I love water!
lines.text_zh: 我可以有个游泳池吗？我最喜欢玩水！

lines.text_en: So everyone had an idea. Now they just needed to make it happen!
lines.text_zh: 大家都有了主意，现在只差动手做了！

scenes.stage_direction_en: The next morning, everyone meets at the park.
scenes.stage_direction_zh: 第二天早上，大家在空地集合了。

lines.text_en: The next morning, everyone met at the park. Amy had a plan!
lines.text_zh: 第二天早上，大家在空地集合了。艾米有了一个计划！

lines.text_en: OK team, here's the plan! We'll build a dinosaur house near the pond!
lines.text_zh: 好了团队，计划是这样的！我们在池塘旁边给恐龙建一个家！

lines.text_en: Amy, you draw the design! Tom, you can help me carry the wood!
lines.text_zh: 艾米，你来画设计图！汤姆，你帮我搬木头！

lines.text_en: I can do that!
lines.text_zh: 我可以！
lines.stage_direction_en: picks up a small piece of wood

lines.text_en: I can carry the BIG stuff!
lines.text_zh: 大件的交给我！

lines.text_en: I'll plant flowers to make it pretty!
lines.text_zh: 我来种花，让它变漂亮！

lines.text_en: When we all work together, we can do anything!
lines.text_zh: 大家一起努力，什么都能做到！

lines.text_en: They worked all day long. And by sunset... it was done!
lines.text_zh: 他们干了一整天。等到太阳下山的时候……完成了！

scenes.stage_direction_en: The new home is ready! Everyone celebrates.
scenes.stage_direction_zh: 新家建好了！大家开心庆祝。

lines.text_en: The dinosaur house was amazing! It had a garden for Daisy, a pool for Rex, and a big sign that said "HOME SWEET HOME."
lines.text_zh: 恐龙的房子太棒了！有黛西的花园，有雷克斯的游泳池，还有一块大牌子写着"甜蜜的家"。

lines.text_en: This is AWESOME! Best home ever!
lines.text_zh: 太棒了！这是最棒的家！

lines.text_en: Thank you all! You're the best friends ever!
lines.text_zh: 谢谢你们！你们是我最好的朋友！

lines.text_en: We did it! We built a home for the dinosaurs!
lines.text_zh: 我们做到了！我们给恐龙建了一个家！

lines.text_en: Can we come over and play again tomorrow?
lines.text_zh: 我们明天还能来玩吗？

lines.text_en: Of course! Come over anytime!
lines.text_zh: 当然！随时都可以来！

lines.text_en: And bring cookies next time!
lines.text_zh: 下次带饼干来哦！

lines.text_en: My door is always open for friends! Now... who wants juice?
lines.text_zh: 我的门永远为朋友敞开！现在……谁想喝果汁？

lines.text_en: ME! 🎉
lines.text_zh: 我要！🎉

lines.text_en: And so, Rex and Daisy found a wonderful new home, and everyone on Maple Street lived happily ever after. The End!
lines.text_zh: 就这样，雷克斯和黛西找到了一个美好的新家，枫叶街上的每个人都过上了快乐的生活。故事结束！

description_en: A mysterious key under an old oak tree leads Amy and Tom to a frozen secret garden — and three impossible tasks! Can two ordinary kids break a witch's curse before midnight? A story about kindness, courage, and the magic in every child's heart.
description_zh: 一把藏在老橡树下的神秘钥匙，带艾米和汤姆走进了一座冰封的秘密花园，还有三项不可能完成的任务！两个普通的孩子，能在午夜前破除女巫的诅咒吗？一个关于善意、勇气和每个孩子心中魔法的故事。

characters.personality_en: Warm, storytelling
Smart, caring, big sister
Brave, impulsive, little brother
Mysterious, keeper of the garden
A neighbor with heavy grocery bags
characters.personality_zh: 拎着沉重购物袋的邻居

characters.personality_en: A little girl who lost her cat
A frustrated boy with a broken kite
Cold and menacing, but no match for kindness
characters.personality_zh: 冷酷凶狠，却敌不过善意

lines.text_en: Hello, everyone! Welcome to our play — "The Secret Garden"! This is a story about a sister named Amy, and her little brother Tom. One day after school, they find a mysterious key under an old oak tree. That key leads them to a secret garden, a lonely rose, and three impossible tasks. Can two ordinary kids break a witch's curse? Let's find out!
lines.text_zh: 大家好！欢迎来到我们的小剧场——《秘密花园》！这个故事讲的是姐姐艾米和弟弟汤姆。有一天放学后，他们在老橡树下发现了一把神秘的钥匙。这把钥匙带他们走进了一座秘密花园、一朵孤独的玫瑰，还有三项不可能完成的任务。两个普通的孩子，能破除女巫的诅咒吗？我们一起来看看吧！

scenes.stage_direction_en: After school. Amy and Tom are walking home. Tom kicks a stone. He looks bored.
scenes.stage_direction_zh: 放学了。艾米和汤姆走在回家的路上。汤姆踢着石子，一脸无聊。

lines.text_en: Boring day! Nothing fun ever happens!
lines.text_zh: 好无聊！从来没什么好玩的事！

lines.text_en: *(sighs)* At least it's Friday. Want to play soccer?
lines.text_zh: （叹气）至少是周五了。想踢球吗？

lines.text_en: Wait! What's that? Under the big tree!
lines.text_zh: 等等！那是什么？大树底下！

lines.text_en: They run to the oak tree. Tom picks up a rusty key with a purple ribbon.
lines.text_zh: 他们跑到橡树下。汤姆捡起一把生锈的钥匙，上面系着紫色丝带。

lines.text_en: Wow! A key! Maybe it opens a treasure chest!
lines.text_zh: 哇！一把钥匙！说不定能打开宝箱！

lines.text_en: Or someone's lost house key.
lines.text_zh: 也可能是谁丢的家门钥匙。

lines.text_en: Only one way to find out! Come on!
lines.text_zh: 试试看嘛！走！

lines.text_en: And so, Amy and Tom follow the key's clue… all the way to a hidden garden gate.
lines.text_zh: 于是，艾米和汤姆顺着钥匙的线索……一路找到了隐藏的花园大门。

scenes.stage_direction_en: The gate creaks open. Inside, everything is frozen. Gray trees. Dead flowers. But in the middle, one rosebush glows with golden light. A woman in a torn cloak kneels beside it.
scenes.stage_direction_zh: 大门吱呀一声开了。里面的一切都被冰封了。灰色的树，枯萎的花。但在正中央，一丛玫瑰闪着金光。一个披着破斗篷的女人跪在花旁。

lines.text_en: Creepy… Everything's dead except that rose.
lines.text_zh: 好吓人……除了那朵玫瑰，全都死了。

lines.text_en: Look! Someone's there!
lines.text_zh: 看！有人！

lines.text_en: You shouldn't be here, children. Please go.
lines.text_zh: 你们不该来这儿，孩子们。请走吧。
lines.stage_direction_en: turns, a scar on her cheek

lines.text_en: Are you a witch?
lines.text_zh: 你是女巫吗？

lines.text_en: Tom! She's just… a gardener. Right?
lines.text_zh: 汤姆！她只是……园丁。对吧？

lines.text_en: A gardener? Once, yes. Three witch sisters cursed my garden. They froze everything — except this one rose.
lines.text_zh: 园丁？曾经是吧。三个女巫姐妹诅咒了我的花园。她们冻结了一切——除了这朵玫瑰。

lines.text_en: How can we help?
lines.text_zh: 我们能帮忙吗？

lines.text_en: To break the curse… three pure hearts must finish three impossible tasks. Before midnight.
lines.text_zh: 要破除诅咒……三个纯洁的心灵必须在午夜前完成三项不可能的任务。

lines.text_en: Impossible? We can do it!
lines.text_zh: 不可能？我们能做到！

lines.text_en: Tom! Don't promise things we can't do!
lines.text_h: 汤姆！别随便承诺做不到的事！

lines.text_en: We shall see. Good luck, children.
lines.text_zh: 我们拭目以待。祝你们好运，孩子们。

scenes.title_en: Act Three · Task One: The Bridge
scenes.stage_direction_en: Amy and Tom come to an old bridge. A man is struggling with heavy grocery bags.
scenes.stage_direction_zh: 艾米和汤姆来到一座旧桥前。一位叔叔正吃力地提着沉重的购物袋。

lines.text_en: Task One! Amy and Tom come to an old bridge. A man is struggling with heavy grocery bags.
lines.text_zh: 第一项任务！艾米和汤姆来到一座旧桥前。一位叔叔正吃力地提着沉重的购物袋。

lines.text_en: Ohhh! These bags are so heavy! I'll never make it across!
lines.text_zh: 哎呀！这些袋子太重了！我肯定过不去！

lines.text_en: Let me help you, sir!
lines.text_zh: 我来帮您，叔叔！

lines.text_en: You? But you're just a little kid!
lines.text_zh: 你？你还是个小孩子呢！

lines.text_en: Don't worry — he's stronger than he looks!
lines.text_zh: 别担心——他比看起来力气大！

lines.text_en: Tom carries the bags across the bridge, step by step. He makes it!
lines.text_zh: 汤姆一步一步把袋子搬过了桥。他做到了！

lines.text_en: Thank you, young man! You have a kind heart!
lines.text_zh: 谢谢你，小伙子！你有一颗善良的心！

lines.text_en: Anytime!
lines.text_zh: 不客气！

scenes.title_en: Act Three · Task Two: The Lost Cat
scenes.stage_direction_en: A little girl named Lily is crying. Her cat Mittens is lost.
scenes.stage_direction_zh: 一个叫莉莉的小女孩在哭。她的小猫手套不见了。

lines.text_en: Task Two! A little girl named Lily is crying. Her cat Mittens is lost.
lines.text_zh: 第二项任务！一个叫莉莉的小女孩在哭。她的小猫手套不见了。

lines.text_en: Mittens! Where are you? She ran away!
lines.text_zh: 手套！你在哪儿？她跑丢了！

lines.text_en: Don't cry. We'll help you find her.
lines.text_zh: 别哭。我们帮你找。

lines.text_en: Here, kitty kitty… What does she look like?
lines.text_zh: 猫咪猫咪……她长什么样？

lines.text_en: Gray, with white paws. She's very shy.
lines.text_zh: 灰色的，白爪子。她很害羞。

lines.text_en: They search and search. Tom looks under a bush.
lines.text_zh: 他们找啊找。汤姆在灌木丛下看了看。

lines.text_en: There she is! Gotcha, Mittens!
lines.text_zh: 找到了！抓住你了，手套！

lines.text_en: Oh, thank you! Thank you so much!
lines.text_zh: 哦，谢谢你们！太谢谢了！

lines.text_en: That felt really good.
lines.text_zh: 这感觉真好。

scenes.title_en: Act Three · Task Three: The Kite
scenes.stage_direction_en: A boy named Max is kicking a broken kite on the ground.
scenes.stage_direction_zh: 一个叫麦克斯的男孩正在踢地上的一只破风筝。

lines.text_en: Task Three! A boy named Max is kicking a broken kite on the ground.
lines.text_zh: 第三项任务！一个叫麦克斯的男孩正在踢地上的一只破风筝。

lines.text_en: Stupid kite! It never flies! It's broken!
lines.text_zh: 破风筝！根本飞不起来！坏掉了！

lines.text_en: Hey, don't give up. Let's fix it together.
lines.text_zh: 嘿，别放弃。我们一起修。

lines.text_en: Tom, hand me that string in your pocket.
lines.text_zh: 汤姆，把你口袋里的线给我。

lines.text_en: How did you know I had string?
lines.text_zh: 你怎么知道我带了线？

lines.text_en: Because you collect everything. Like rusty keys!
lines.text_zh: 因为你什么都捡。比如生锈的钥匙！

lines.text_en: They fix the kite together. Max tries again.
lines.text_zh: 他们一起修好了风筝。麦克斯再次尝试。

lines.text_en: It's flying! It's flying! Thank you!
lines.text_zh: 飞起来了！飞起来了！谢谢你们！

lines.text_en: We did it! All three tasks!
lines.text_zh: 我们做到了！三项任务全部完成！

scenes.title_en: Act Four · The Curse Is Broken
scenes.stage_direction_en: Midnight! Amy and Tom rush back to the garden. The three witches appear, swirling in black cloaks.
scenes.stage_direction_zh: 午夜！艾米和汤姆赶回花园。三个女巫出现了，黑色斗篷旋转飞舞。

lines.text_en: Midnight! Amy and Tom rush back to the garden. The three witches appear, swirling in black cloaks.
lines.text_zh: 午夜！艾米和汤姆赶回花园。三个女巫出现了，黑色斗篷旋转飞舞。

lines.text_en: Foolish children! You think kindness can break our curse?
lines.text_zh: 愚蠢的小孩！你们以为善意能破除我们的诅咒？

lines.text_en: We'll freeze you too!
lines.text_zh: 连你们一起冻住！

lines.text_en: Prepare to —
lines.text_zh: 准备——

lines.text_en: Suddenly, the golden rose blazes with light! It shines brighter and brighter. The witches scream!
lines.text_zh: 突然，金色的玫瑰发出耀眼的光芒！越来越亮。女巫们尖叫起来！

lines.text_en: No! The light! It burns!
lines.text_zh: 不！这光！好烫啊！
lines.stage_direction_en: All Three Witches screaming, they vanish

lines.text_en: The witches vanish. The ice melts. Flowers bloom everywhere. The garden is alive again!
lines.text_zh: 女巫们消失了。冰雪融化。到处鲜花盛开。花园重获新生！

lines.text_en: The curse is broken! You proved that kindness is stronger than any magic.
lines.text_zh: 诅咒破除了！你们证明了——善意比任何魔法都强大。
lines.stage_direction_en: smiles, cloak now bright and new

lines.text_en: But… why us? We're just kids.
lines.text_zh: 可是……为什么是我们？我们只是小孩。

lines.text_en: That's exactly why. Children's hearts are the purest. Now — look at my garden!
lines.text_zh: 正是这个原因。孩子的心灵最纯洁。现在——看看我的花园！

lines.text_en: Flowers bloom in every color. Butterflies dance. All their new friends arrive — the Man, Lily with Mittens, and Max with his kite. Everyone celebrates together!
lines.text_zh: 五颜六色的花朵盛开。蝴蝶飞舞。所有新朋友都来了——路人叔叔、抱着手套的莉莉、拿着风筝的麦克斯。大家一起庆祝！

lines.text_en: Best day ever!
lines.text_zh: 最棒的一天！

lines.text_en: Okay, okay. You were right about the key.
lines.text_zh: 好吧好吧。关于钥匙，你说对了。

lines.text_en: I'm always right!
lines.text_zh: 我一直都是对的！

lines.text_en: Don't push it!
lines.text_zh: 别得意！

lines.text_en: Now then — who's ready for lemonade and cookies?
lines.text_zh: 好了——谁想来点柠檬汁和饼干？

lines.text_en: ME! 🎉
lines.text_zh: 我要！🎉

scenes.stage_direction_en: All actors come to the front of the stage and line up.
scenes.stage_direction_zh: 全体演员走到舞台前方，排成一排。

lines.text_en: And so, the secret garden bloomed again, and Amy and Tom learned that even small acts of kindness can work big magic. The End!
lines.text_zh: 就这样，秘密花园再次盛开。艾米和汤姆明白了：小小的善意也能创造大大的魔法。故事结束！

lines.text_en: Now, everyone — let's take one big bow together! On the count of three — one… two… three!
lines.text_zh: 现在，大家一起——深深一鞠躬！数到三——一……二……三！

lines.text_en: Good night, everyone! See you next time!
lines.text_zh: 大家晚安！下次再见！

description_zh: 音乐太空冒险（上）！一只会发光的外星猫小闪降落在后院，艾米和汤姆登上了星教授的钢琴飞船"旋律探索号"。他们飞到中国，接上会弹钢琴的好朋友露娜，一起飞向月球——音乐，是宇宙中最强大的能量！
description_en: A musical space adventure (Part One)! When a glowing alien cat named Sparkle lands in the backyard, Amy and Tom board Professor Star's piano-shaped spaceship, the Melody Explorer. They fly to China to pick up their pianist friend Luna, then soar toward the Moon — because music is the most powerful energy in the universe!

characters.personality_en: Warm, storytelling
10, loves playing piano, curious and caring
7, Amy's little brother, loves rockets and space, just started learning piano
characters.personality_zh: 7岁，艾米的弟弟，喜欢火箭和太空，刚开始学钢琴

characters.personality_en: 9, Amy and Tom's good friend from China, loves playing piano
characters.personality_zh: 9岁，Amy和Tom在中国奶奶家认识的好朋友，喜欢弹钢琴

characters.personality_en: A wise space explorer, captain of the Melody Explorer
characters.personality_zh: 聪明的太空探险家，旋律探索号的船长

characters.personality_en: A talking, glowing alien cat from Andromeda Galaxy
characters.personality_zh: 从仙女星系来的会说话、会发光的外星猫

lines.text_zh: 大家晚上好！欢迎来看我们的暑期小剧场：《星际变奏曲：一场音乐太空冒险》！这个故事讲的是艾米和她的弟弟汤姆住在北美枫叶街一栋漂亮得房子里。有一天晚上，艾米在练琴，汤姆在想着火星，突然，窗外出现了一只会发光的猫？一架音乐太空船？一趟去月亮的旅行？还有在中国一个叫露娜的女孩，马上就要遇到一个大惊喜啦！准备好了吗？我们出发吧——三、二、一！
lines.text_en: Good evening, everyone! Welcome to our summer theater: "Interstellar Variations: A Musical Space Adventure"! This story is about Amy and her little brother Tom, who live in a beautiful house on Maple Street in North America. One night, Amy is practicing piano and Tom is daydreaming about Mars, when suddenly a glowing cat appears outside the window? A musical spaceship? A trip to the moon? And in China, a girl named Luna is about to get a huge surprise! Ready? Let's blast off — three, two, one!

scenes.title_zh: 第一幕 · 天上有个奇怪的光
scenes.title_en: Act One · A Strange Light in the Sky

lines.text_zh: 晚上。艾米坐在钢琴前，弹着一首温柔的曲子。汤姆躺在地上，身边全是火箭画和玩具飞船。他看着天花板，做着太空梦。
lines.text_en: Nighttime. Amy sits at the piano, playing a gentle tune. Tom lies on the floor, surrounded by rocket drawings and toy spaceships. He stares at the ceiling, dreaming of space.

lines.text_zh: 呜——！太空船，准备发射！目标：火星！三、二、一……发射！
lines.text_en: Whoosh — ! Spaceship, ready for launch! Destination: Mars! Three, two, one… liftoff!

lines.text_zh: 汤姆！我在练琴呢！你能不能带着你的火箭去……嗯……别的星球？
lines.text_en: Tom! I'm practicing! Can't you take your rocket to... hmm... some other planet?

lines.text_zh: 我就是想去别的星球呀，艾米！你知道吗，火星离我们有……两亿多公里远！而且真的有人在造去火星的火箭！伊隆.马斯克!
lines.text_en: That's exactly what I want to do, Amy! Did you know Mars is more than two hundred million kilometers away! And people are really building rockets to go there! Elon Musk!

lines.text_zh: 我知道，我知道。你都跟我说了一百遍了。但是现在，我得把这首曲子弹完。它叫《星光圆舞曲》，我们在中国好朋友露娜也要弹这首。我们明天要视频合奏呢。
lines.text_en: I know, I know. You've told me a hundred times. But right now, I need to finish this piece. It's called "Starlight Waltz" — our friend Luna in China is learning it too. We're doing a video duet tomorrow.

lines.text_zh: 露娜！她太酷了！她会弹好多好听的中国曲子。你还记得她给我们弹的《茉莉花》吗？
lines.text_en: Luna! She's so cool! She can play so many beautiful Chinese songs. Remember "Jasmine Flower," the one she played for us?

lines.text_zh: 记得。她说音乐就像一座桥——能把地球两边的人连在一起。（弹了几个轻柔的音）
lines.text_en: I remember. She said music is like a bridge — it connects people on both sides of the Earth. (plays a few soft notes)

lines.text_zh: 哇——艾米！快看！外面！有个东西……在发光！
lines.text_en: Whoa — Amy! Look! Outside! Something's... glowing!

lines.text_zh: 什么？在哪儿？
lines.text_en: What? Where?

lines.text_zh: 艾米和汤姆跑到窗边。在后院的老橡树旁边，有一团金色的光在黑暗中一闪一闪的。它看起来像一颗小小的星星——但它就在草地上！
lines.text_en: Amy and Tom run to the window. Beside the old oak tree in the backyard, a golden light flickers in the darkness. It looks like a tiny star — but it's right there on the grass!

lines.text_zh: 是萤火虫吗？一只超级大的萤火虫？
lines.text_en: Is it a firefly? A giant firefly?

lines.text_zh: 萤火虫不会发金光。而且它们不会……等等，它是不是在动？
lines.text_en: Fireflies don't glow gold. And they don't... wait, is it moving?

lines.text_zh: 去看看就知道啦！快来！
lines.text_en: Only one way to find out! Come on!

lines.text_zh: 汤姆已经冲出门了。艾米跟着跑出去。他们小心地走向那团光，心砰砰直跳。
lines.text_en: Tom has already dashed out the door. Amy runs after him. They creep toward the light, hearts pounding.

scenes.title_zh: 第二幕 · 从星星来的猫
scenes.title_en: Act Two · The Cat from the Stars

lines.text_zh: 橡树下面，金色的光越来越亮。那根本不是萤火虫。那是一只小小的、毛茸茸的动物——一只猫！但这只猫像星光一样闪闪发亮，它的眼睛像两个小小的银河。
lines.text_en: Under the oak tree, the golden light grows brighter. It's not a firefly at all. It's a small, furry creature — a cat! But this cat shimmers like starlight, and its eyes look like two tiny galaxies.

lines.text_zh: 不……会吧。一只会发光的猫。艾米，你看到了吗？
lines.text_en: No... way. A glowing cat. Amy, are you seeing this?

lines.text_zh: 我……我想我看到了？除非我们俩在做同一个梦。
lines.text_en: I... I think so? Unless we're both having the same dream.

lines.text_zh: 喵……哇，这一觉睡得好长啊。哦！你们好呀，地球上的小朋友！我降落对地方了吗？这里是地球，对吧？
lines.text_en: Meow... wow, that was a long nap. Oh! Hello there, Earth children! Did I land in the right place? This is Earth, right?

lines.text_zh: 它会说话！艾米，这只发光的猫会说话！
lines.text_en: It talks! Amy, this glowing cat can talk!

lines.text_zh: 嗯……你好？你是……谁？你从哪里来的？
lines.text_en: Um... hello? Who... are you? Where are you from?

lines.text_zh: 我叫小闪。我是从仙女星系来的星光猫。我在宇宙里到处旅行，收集好听的声音——音乐呀、笑声呀、歌声呀。我的飞船音乐能量不够了，只好紧急降落。 你们不会刚好认识会弹音乐的人吧？
lines.text_en: I'm Sparkle. I'm a starlight cat from the Andromeda galaxy. I travel all over the universe collecting beautiful sounds — music, laughter, singing. My ship ran low on musical energy, so I had to make an emergency landing. You wouldn't happen to know anyone who plays music, would you?

lines.text_zh: 艾米会弹钢琴！她弹得可好了！我还知道所有关于火箭的知识！还有我们在中国的朋友露娜也会弹钢琴！她会弹几百年以前的老歌！
lines.text_en: Amy plays piano! She's really good! And I know everything about rockets! And our friend Luna in China plays piano too! She can play songs that are hundreds of years old!

lines.text_zh: 钢琴？真的、活生生的钢琴音乐？那可是宇宙里最厉害的能量！ 啊——我的驾驶员来了。
lines.text_en: Piano? Real, live piano music? That's the most powerful energy in the whole universe! Ah — my pilot is here.

lines.text_zh: 空中传来轻轻的嗡嗡声。一架漂亮的飞船——样子像一架长了翅膀的大钢琴——从星星中间悄悄飞下来，停在后院上方。一位看起来很亲切的银发老爷爷走了出来，他的外套上画满了星座图案。
lines.text_en: A soft humming sound fills the air. A beautiful spaceship — shaped like a grand piano with wings — quietly descends from among the stars and lands above the backyard. A kind-looking, silver-haired old man steps out, his coat covered in constellation patterns.

lines.text_zh: 晚上好，地球上的小朋友们！我是星教授，是"旋律探索号"的船长。看来你们已经认识我的导航员小闪了。希望她没有给你们添太多麻烦。
lines.text_en: Good evening, Earth children! I'm Professor Star, captain of the "Melody Explorer." It seems you've already met my navigator, Sparkle. I hope she hasn't caused too much trouble.

lines.text_zh: 你们的飞船……长得像一架钢琴！
lines.text_en: Your spaceship... looks like a piano!

lines.text_zh: 当然啦！"旋律探索号"用的是宇宙里最强大的能量：音乐。每一个音符、每一个和弦、每一段旋律——都能给我们的星际旅行提供能量。但是现在，我们的能量快用完了。我们需要一个音乐小队。你们……有兴趣吗？
lines.text_en: Of course! The "Melody Explorer" runs on the most powerful energy in the universe: music. Every note, every chord, every melody powers our journey through the stars. But right now, we're running low on fuel. We need a music crew. Are you two... interested?

lines.text_zh: 有！有！一千个有！
lines.text_en: Yes! Yes! A thousand times yes!

lines.text_zh: 等等——星教授，我能问一个问题吗？我们的朋友露娜住在中国。她钢琴弹得特别好，而且她和我们一样喜欢星星。我们能不能……能不能也带上她？
lines.text_en: Wait — Professor Star, can I ask something? Our friend Luna lives in China. She's an amazing pianist, and she loves stars just as much as we do. Could we... could we bring her along too?

lines.text_zh: 一个既喜欢音乐又喜欢星星的朋友？那正是我们需要的小队员！小闪，设定航线，去中国！我们还要接一位乘客！
lines.text_en: A friend who loves both music and stars? That's exactly the crew member we need! Sparkle, set a course for China! We have another passenger to pick up!

lines.text_zh: 喵！音乐绕路！我最喜欢绕路了！
lines.text_en: Meow! A musical detour! I love detours!

scenes.title_zh: 第三幕 · 露娜的惊喜

lines.text_zh: "旋律探索号"在夜空中飞过，安静得像说悄悄话。几分钟后，他们来到了中国一个安静的小区上空。露娜正坐在窗边，在钢琴上练一首曲子。突然，一道金色的光照亮了她的房间。
lines.text_en: The "Melody Explorer" glides through the night sky, quiet as a whisper. A few minutes later, they arrive above a quiet neighborhood in China. Luna is sitting by her window, practicing a piece on the piano. Suddenly, a golden light fills her room.

lines.text_zh: 什么——？那是……一架飞船？在我窗外？
lines.text_en: What — ? Is that... a spaceship? Outside my window?

lines.text_zh: （ 露娜！露娜，是我们！艾米和汤姆！快出来！
lines.text_en: Luna! Luna, it's us! Amy and Tom! Come outside!

lines.text_zh: 艾米？汤姆？我是在做梦吗？
lines.text_en: Amy? Tom? Am I dreaming?

lines.text_zh: 露娜跑出去。她看到了那架漂亮的钢琴飞船、会发光的猫、银头发的教授——还有她的两个好朋友在飞船门口朝她挥手。
lines.text_en: Luna runs outside. She sees the beautiful piano-shaped spaceship, the glowing cat, the silver-haired professor — and her two good friends waving to her from the doorway.

lines.text_zh: 露娜！我们要去太空！去弹钢琴！去月亮上！还有火星！跟我们一起去吧！
lines.text_en: Luna! We're going to space! To play piano! To the moon! And Mars! Come with us!

lines.text_zh: 这是我遇到过最疯狂的事了。 我去！
lines.text_en: This is the craziest thing that's ever happened to me. I'm in!

lines.text_zh: 欢迎登上"旋律探索号"，露娜！艾米跟我说你会弹好听的传统曲子。我们很想听一首。
lines.text_en: Welcome to the "Melody Explorer," Luna! Amy tells me you play beautiful traditional pieces. We'd love to hear one.

lines.text_zh: 这架钢琴……它在发光！好像是用星光做的！
lines.text_en: This piano... it's glowing! Like it's made of starlight!

lines.text_zh: 这是宇宙钢琴！它能把音乐变成能量。曲子越好听，我们飞得越快！
lines.text_en: That's the cosmic piano! It turns music into energy. The better the music, the faster we fly!

lines.text_zh: 那我弹一首我心里的歌吧。这是我外婆教我的。叫《柠檬树》。
lines.text_en: Then let me play a song from my heart. My grandmother taught it to me. It's called "Lemon Tree."

lines.text_zh: 露娜把手指放在发光的琴键上。一首轻快又温暖的曲子充满了飞船——像阳光下的柠檬一样清新，像夏日的微风一样舒服。钢琴上的水晶发出金色的光。整艘飞船都充满了能量。
lines.text_en: Luna places her fingers on the glowing keys. A light, warm melody fills the ship — as fresh as lemons in the sunshine, as soothing as a summer breeze. The crystals on the piano glow gold. The whole ship fills with energy.

lines.text_zh: 太棒了！能量槽在往上涨！快乐的旋律让人心情好——这是很特别的能量！
lines.text_en: Wonderful! The energy gauge is climbing! Happy melodies make wonderful energy — this is special!

lines.text_zh: 喵……我的胡须都能感觉到音乐了！
lines.text_en: Meow... even my whiskers can feel the music!

lines.text_zh: 露娜，太好听了！现在我们出发吧！去月亮！
lines.text_en: Luna, that was beautiful! Now let's go! To the moon!

lines.text_zh: 航线设定：月亮！全体船员，准备起飞！小闪，启动音乐引擎！
lines.text_en: Course set: the Moon! All crew, prepare for takeoff! Sparkle, start the music engine!

lines.text_zh: 喵——音乐引擎……启动！
lines.text_en: Meow — music engine... start!

lines.text_zh: "旋律探索号"飞向夜空。地球在他们身后越来越小。前方：月亮的银色光芒。
lines.text_en: The "Melody Explorer" soars into the night sky. Earth grows smaller behind them. Ahead: the silver glow of the moon.

description_zh: 音乐太空冒险（下）！在月球上的月光音乐会上，三个孩子用钢琴、中国传统旋律和火箭的声音一起奏响宇宙。他们飞往火星，为红色星球献上第一场星际合奏，然后——回家。音乐，是连接人与人、星球与星系的桥。
description_en: A musical space adventure (Part Two)! On the Moon, the three children play piano, traditional Chinese melodies, and the sound of rockets. They journey to Mars for the planet's very first interstellar concert — then head home. Music is the bridge between people, planets, and galaxies.

characters.personality_en: Warm, storytelling
10, loves playing piano, curious and caring
7, Amy's little brother, loves rockets and space, just started learning piano
characters.personality_zh: 7岁，艾米的弟弟，喜欢火箭和太空，刚开始学钢琴

characters.personality_en: 9, Amy and Tom's good friend from China, loves playing piano
characters.personality_zh: 9岁，Amy和Tom在中国奶奶家认识的好朋友，喜欢弹钢琴

characters.personality_en: A wise space explorer, captain of the Melody Explorer
characters.personality_zh: 聪明的太空探险家，旋律探索号的船长

characters.personality_en: A talking, glowing alien cat from Andromeda Galaxy
characters.personality_zh: 从仙女星系来的会说话、会发光的外星猫

scenes.title_zh: 第四幕 · 月亮上的音乐会
scenes.title_en: Act Four · Concert on the Moon

lines.text_zh: 飞船降落在月球表面。细细的灰色灰尘在起落架旁边飘起来。透过窗户，孩子们看到了地球——一颗漂亮的蓝绿色弹珠，挂在黑色的天空中。
lines.text_en: The ship lands on the surface of the moon. Fine gray dust drifts around the landing gear. Through the window, the children see Earth — a beautiful blue-green marble hanging in the black sky.

lines.text_zh: 哇！我在飞！我是说——我在走路，但感觉像在飞！
lines.text_en: Whoa! I'm flying! I mean — I'm walking, but it feels like flying!

lines.text_zh: 这就是月球的引力，汤姆！月球的引力只有地球的六分之一。如果你在地球上重六十斤，在这里你只有十斤重！
lines.text_en: That's the moon's gravity, Tom! The moon's gravity is only one-sixth of Earth's. If you weigh sixty pounds on Earth, you'd only weigh ten pounds here!

lines.text_zh: 这太好玩了！我像超人一样！
lines.text_en: This is so much fun! I'm like Superman!

lines.text_zh: 在这里弹钢琴感觉都不一样！我的手指好轻啊！
lines.text_en: Playing piano here feels so different! My fingers feel so light!

lines.text_zh: 看……从这里看，能看到地球上的陆地！那是北美，那是亚洲。从月亮上看，根本没有国界。
lines.text_en: Look... from here, you can see the land on Earth! That's North America, and that's Asia. From the moon, there are no borders at all.

lines.text_zh: 你说得对。从月亮上看，地球就是……一个家。一个又大又美的家。
lines.text_en: You're right. From up here, Earth is just... one home. One big, beautiful home.

lines.text_zh: 喵！引力小就能多翻跟头！看我的！
lines.text_en: Meow! Less gravity means more flips! Watch this!

lines.text_zh: 好了——谁准备好参加第一场月光音乐会了？艾米，你来弹第一首曲子好吗？
lines.text_en: All right — who's ready for the first moonlight concert? Amy, would you like to play the first piece?

lines.text_zh: 这首曲子送给地球上的每一个人。它叫《童年的回忆》。露娜，我知道你也练过这首。后半段跟我一起弹好吗？
lines.text_en: This one is for everyone on Earth. It's called "Childhood Memories." Luna, I know you've practiced this one too. Will you join me for the second half?

lines.text_zh: 好啊。
lines.text_en: Sure.

lines.text_zh: 艾米开始弹琴。音符在月球上飘荡，通过飞船的喇叭传遍这片安静的大地。弹到一半，露娜加入了——她的右手在艾米的旋律上编织出一条中国风的副旋律。东方和西方，古老和现代，在星空下一起跳舞。
lines.text_en: Amy begins to play. The notes drift across the moon, carried by the ship's speakers over the quiet ground. Halfway through, Luna joins in — her right hand weaving a melody with a Chinese flavor over Amy's tune. East and West, old and new, dancing together under the stars.

lines.text_zh: 我探索银河这么多年……从来没听过这么美的音乐。两个朋友，两种文化，一首歌。
lines.text_en: In all my years exploring the galaxy... I've never heard anything so beautiful. Two friends, two cultures, one song.

lines.text_zh: 音乐能量……满出来了！我们能飞到宇宙的尽头！
lines.text_en: The musical energy... is overflowing! We could fly to the edge of the universe!

lines.text_zh: 星教授？我刚刚开始学习弹钢琴。但是我练了一首曲子。我能……我能试试吗？
lines.text_en: Professor Star? I just started learning piano. But I've been practicing one piece. Can I... can I try?

lines.text_zh: 当然可以，汤姆！宇宙钢琴欢迎每一个人。
lines.text_en: Of course, Tom! The cosmic piano welcomes everyone.

lines.text_zh: 好。我会弹卡农呢！ 还有一首是我自己编的。我叫它《火箭起飞》。
lines.text_en: Okay. I'll play Canon first! And then one I made up myself. I call it "Rocket Liftoff."

lines.text_zh: （抱住他）汤姆！你钢琴曲从来没有弹得这么好！
lines.text_en: Tom! You've never played that well before!

lines.text_zh: 我可能就是需要一架对的钢琴。还有一个对的地方。还有……你知道……在月亮上。
lines.text_en: I guess I just needed the right piano. And the right place. And... you know... being on the moon.

lines.text_zh: 太厉害了，汤姆！真的像火箭起飞的声音！
lines.text_en: That was amazing, Tom! It really sounded like a rocket taking off!

lines.text_zh: 喵喵喵！能量表完全满了！教授，我们可以去任何地方！
lines.text_en: Meow meow meow! The energy gauge is completely full! Professor, we can go anywhere!

lines.text_zh: 任何地方？那——去火星怎么样？
lines.text_en: Anywhere? Then — how about Mars?

lines.text_zh: 红色星球？真的吗？
lines.text_en: The Red Planet? Really?

lines.text_zh: 真的。不过首先——让我们给地球发一条消息。小闪，启动星际广播！
lines.text_en: Really. But first — let's send Earth a message. Sparkle, start the interstellar broadcast!

lines.text_zh: 全频率广播！地球，你能听到我们吗？
lines.text_en: Broadcasting on all frequencies! Earth, can you hear us?

lines.text_zh: "旋律探索号"飞向火星。窗外，星星像光线一样划过。飞船里，孩子们围在宇宙钢琴旁边，准备最后一场演奏会。
lines.text_en: The "Melody Explorer" flies toward Mars. Outside the window, stars streak by like beams of light. Inside the ship, the children gather around the cosmic piano, ready for one last grand performance.

lines.text_zh: 我们快到火星了！看——那是奥林匹斯山，整个太阳系最高的火山。它差不多是珠穆朗玛峰的三倍高！
lines.text_en: We're almost at Mars! Look — that's Olympus Mons, the tallest volcano in the whole solar system. It's almost three times taller than Mount Everest!

lines.text_zh: 三倍！那如果要爬上去，得带三倍的零食！
lines.text_en: Three times! If we climb it, we'll need three times the snacks!

lines.text_zh: 火星叫红色星球，是因为它的土里面有铁锈。就像整个星球都在脸红一样！
lines.text_en: Mars is called the Red Planet because there's rust in its soil. It's like the whole planet is blushing!

lines.text_zh: 教授，你觉得人类以后真的会住在火星上吗？
lines.text_en: Professor, do you think people will really live on Mars someday?

lines.text_zh: 我相信会的。但是你知道吗，第一批火星人最需要的是什么？不只是食物、水和房子。他们需要音乐。他们需要歌来提醒自己家在哪里。他们需要朋友一起玩。
lines.text_en: I believe they will. But do you know what the first Mars settlers will need most? Not just food, water, and shelter. They'll need music. They'll need songs to remind them where home is. They'll need friends to share it with.

lines.text_zh: 一个没有声音的星球是一个伤心的星球。每个世界都需要自己的音乐！
lines.text_en: A planet with no sound is a sad planet. Every world needs its own music!

lines.text_zh: 那我们来给火星开第一场音乐会！就现在！
lines.text_en: Then let's give Mars its very first concert! Right now!

lines.text_zh: 好主意！艾米、露娜、汤姆——一起来弹一首《星际变奏曲》吧！这首曲子把所有的东西都放在一起：古典的、传统的、还有……火箭的声音。我和小闪来指挥星星！
lines.text_en: Great idea! Amy, Luna, Tom — let's play "Interstellar Variations" together! This piece brings everything together: classical, traditional, and... rocket sounds. Sparkle and I will conduct the stars!

lines.text_zh: 于是，在火星红色大地的上空，三个孩子一起弹起了琴。艾米的古典基础稳稳地托着旋律。露娜的中国传统音阶像丝带一样在上面跳舞。汤姆加上轰隆隆的低音——那是火箭梦想起飞的声音。宇宙钢琴比任何时候都亮。
lines.text_en: And so, above the red ground of Mars, the three children play together. Amy's classical foundation holds the melody steady. Luna's traditional Chinese scale dances above it like a ribbon. Tom adds the rumbling low notes — the sound of a rocket dream taking flight. The cosmic piano glows brighter than ever.

lines.text_zh: 喵……旋律……和声……整个宇宙都在听！
lines.text_en: Meow... melody... harmony... the whole universe is listening!

lines.text_zh: 看！星星在跟着音乐一闪一闪的！银河在给我们鼓掌！
lines.text_en: Look! The stars are twinkling along with the music! The galaxy is applauding for us!

lines.text_zh: 音乐穿过太空。在地球上，人们抬头看着夜空，心里感到一阵温暖，虽然他们不知道为什么。加拿大的一个小女孩哼起了一首从没听过的歌。中国的一位奶奶听到一段旋律笑了，那旋律像一个老朋友。
lines.text_en: The music travels across space. On Earth, people look up at the night sky and feel a strange warmth, though they don't know why. A little girl in Canada hums a tune she's never heard before. A grandmother in China smiles at a melody that sounds like an old friend.

lines.text_zh: 这是……我弹得最好的一次。
lines.text_en: That was... the best I've ever played.

lines.text_zh: 因为我们一起弹的。音乐和朋友在一起，总是更好听。
lines.text_en: Because we played it together. Music is always better with friends.

lines.text_zh: 火箭加上音乐也更好！我们应该在每一架飞船里都放一架钢琴！
lines.text_en: Rockets are better with music too! We should put a piano on every spaceship!

lines.text_zh: 喵……这么多音乐让我好困。我们能回家了吗？我想我的宇宙猫窝了。
lines.text_en: Meow... so much music is making me sleepy. Can we go home now? I miss my cosmic cat bed.

lines.text_zh: 小闪说得对。每一次冒险都要结束——这样新的冒险才能开始。让我们把小朋友们送回家吧。
lines.text_en: Sparkle's right. Every adventure has to end — so a new one can begin. Let's take these kids home.

lines.text_zh: "旋律探索号"飞回地球。它先把露娜送回家——她在窗边挥手告别，已经在想要写一首关于这次旅行的歌了。然后艾米和汤姆被轻轻放回后院，天边正好露出第一缕金色的晨光。
lines.text_en: The "Melody Explorer" flies back to Earth. First, it drops Luna off at home — she waves goodbye from her window, already thinking up a song about this journey. Then Amy and Tom are gently set down in the backyard, just as the first golden light of dawn appears on the horizon.

lines.text_zh: 艾米、汤姆——谢谢你们。你们让我想起了一件很重要的事。宇宙里最强大的力量不是引力，不是光，甚至不是音乐本身。是友谊。是分享一首歌的人之间的纽带。
lines.text_en: Amy, Tom — thank you. You reminded me of something important. The most powerful force in the universe isn't gravity, or light, or even music itself. It's friendship. It's the bond between people who share a song.

lines.text_zh: 别忘了——每次你们弹钢琴，我们都会听到。就算在仙女星系也能听到。在星光猫的语言里，喵是"再见"的意思。但它也是"很快再见"的意思。
lines.text_en: Don't forget — every time you play piano, we'll hear it. Even from the Andromeda galaxy. In starlight cat language, "meow" means "goodbye." But it also means "see you soon."

lines.text_zh: 我们还会再见到你们吗？
lines.text_en: Will we see you again?

lines.text_zh: 只要在星星下面弹一首歌。我们就会找到你。
lines.text_en: Just play a song under the stars. We'll find you.

lines.text_zh: 星教授！下次我们能去木星吗？它有……九十几颗卫星！我们可以在每一颗卫星上都开一场音乐会！
lines.text_en: Professor Star! Can we go to Jupiter next time? It has... like ninety-something moons! We could hold a concert on every single one!

lines.text_zh: 九十五场音乐会？那我们得赶紧开始练琴了！再见啦，地球上的小朋友们！继续弹琴，继续做梦，继续抬头看星星！
lines.text_en: Ninety-five concerts? Then we'd better start practicing right away! Goodbye, Earth children! Keep playing, keep dreaming, keep looking up at the stars!

lines.text_zh: "旋律探索号"飞向清晨的天空，越来越小，直到看起来就像另一颗星星。艾米和汤姆站在后院里，一直看到它消失。
lines.text_en: The "Melody Explorer" flies off into the morning sky, growing smaller and smaller, until it looks just like another star. Amy and Tom stand in the backyard and watch until it disappears.

lines.text_zh: 汤姆？我想我现在明白了。露娜说的——音乐是一座桥。
lines.text_en: Tom? I think I understand now. What Luna said — music is a bridge.

lines.text_zh: 嗯？
lines.text_en: Hm?

lines.text_zh: 它不只是国家之间的桥。它是……所有东西之间的桥。人、星球、甚至星系。只要有音乐，就没有人是孤单的。
lines.text_en: It's not just a bridge between countries. It's a bridge between... everything. People, planets, even galaxies. As long as someone is playing music, no one is ever truly alone.

lines.text_zh: 说得真好，艾米。来吧——我想在吃早饭前再练练我的《火箭起飞》！
lines.text_en: That was really well said, Amy. Come on — I want to practice "Rocket Liftoff" one more time before breakfast!

lines.text_zh: 就这样，三个在地球两边的小朋友学会了：音乐能带你去任何地方——跨过大海，穿过太空，一直到星星那里，再回来。你只需要心里有一首歌，还有一个朋友跟你一起分享。故事结束。
lines.text_en: And so, two children on one side of the world, and their friend on the other, learned something wonderful: music can take you anywhere — across the ocean, through space, all the way to the stars, and back again. All you need is a song in your heart, and a friend to share it with. The end.

lines.text_zh: 晚安，大家！继续抬头看星星——继续让音乐响起来！
lines.text_en: Goodnight, everyone! Keep looking up at the stars — and keep the music playing!
